ResearchProjectDef.label: herald fragment analysis
ResearchProjectDef.description: Herald core fragments cannot be decoded through ordinary research data alone. Study one at a hi-tech research bench to complete this analysis and unlock Herald-tier weapon and implant research. This project is intended to be completed by analysis, not by ordinary research progress.

ResearchProjectDef.label: herald weapon integration
ResearchProjectDef.description: Convert herald core telemetry into stable weapon architecture. Unlocks the first Herald-derived heavy weapon patterns for the Abyssal Forge.

ResearchProjectDef.label: herald implant integration
ResearchProjectDef.description: Reverse-engineer the first boss into controlled combat augmentation. Unlocks the first true Herald-grade infernal implants for the Abyssal Forge once a recovered fragment has been properly analyzed.
